sous_titres.text: Your entire training will go into cleaning
Remember the bond all you trainees signed at the beginning?
If it's broken for any reason,
...and your parents will end up paying three hundred thousand rupees.
So whoever has been wiping their feet on guest towels...
...let me remind you of the cameras in every corridor!
if ammonia and bleach are both excellent cleaning agents...
Because they turn into Chloromine, which is dangerous.
So now you know, Mr Dan, why your junior is training with you.
If she's so smart, she should have been a scientist and served the nation.
Rest of us could have managed the hotel
If you manage your own training; that would be enough.
Sarin...the room is booked for Akaash Sarin
What do you mean by 'twin bed'?
There must be a mistake, I clicked on 'double bed'.
That may be, but it's a third-party booking...
I don't care. I clicked on 'double bed' and that's what I want.
Sure Sir, but as I've said, it's not available, otherwise...
Can't you see I'm with my wife?
And I come here so often! Bloody idiot!
In fact I checked you in last time too...
So, shall I get your luggage taken to the room?
I could've been at the pool.
It doesn't matter who the guest is with, a wife, a girlfriend, whoever...
You're no one to sit in judgment.
But, Sir, you know that she is... - It doesn't matter!
And what are you doing here at pool side?
Aren't you supposed to be in the garden wing?
Sir, you've given me third floor vacuuming again!
I just did it last week.
Can't you give it to someone else? - I'll thwack you!
Now, get back to work. - Sir...Sir...
Sir...give me the kitchen duty. I'm great at chopping.
Or the bar is also fine.
Oh, so now you want to be at the bar?
Yes sir, I make really good cocktails at home.
And they are very nice sir.
When the wedding venue is so far away, which idiot booked us here?
Well, you demanded a stay in a luxury hotel...
And now you're calling my dad an idiot?
Maybe he's still in the room.
...either I file an official complaint or...
I'm sending you off to the laundry!
Sorry, Sir! Spare me the laundry. - No. Laundry for a week.
Sorry, Sir, this won't happen again.
And you better not be seen anywhere else.
You know what a startup is?
Own a small business instead of slaving away at a job.
If I were you, I'd have opened my own laundry.
If you keep standing all day, you'll get varicose veins
Anyone of you could get it.
You should soak your legs in hot water with salt.
Whose bright idea was it to iron the underpants for Room 602?
Ever heard of the concept of elastic?
You'll all be in trouble. There's been a complaint.
Will you stop? I'm sick of you
Just do what you've been sent here for.
Another word and I'll shove you into one of these machines.
He's being aggressive for no reason.
Take it easy, I'll talk to him.
There's been a complaint from Room 602.
602? - Yes, because these geniuses had ironed the underpants. Okay let me check
Here? - A little to the right
Listen, are you really serious about our restaurant venture?
I can leave the training right away and start, but can you guys?
It's Dan's. - We can't leave it midway
Then what's the point in bringing it up again and again?
Because my parents want me to get married
And how are the two connected?
What if you guys decide to start a street-side counter?
I'd rather get married than do that
Then we can cater the food at her wedding.
If that's the case then I am not getting married at all!
But you could've picked them up. Uhm.
So go ahead and complaint then.
Put all the 500 ml ones on the table
And check the champagne at the bar - no more than 12.
Excuse me, Sir, the client had ordered 15 bottles.
What do you want to do with the rest?
I know guys but there's one real ridiculous party going on downstairs
Who all were around last night, binging?
Stop covering up for Dan or you all are going to get it!
Sir, we were just hanging around.
Two bottles are missing from the inventory.
Namashkar (INDIAN GREETING), How may I help you today?
Could you guide us on what to see in your city?
Yes! You can visit old Delhi, the Lal Qila (RED FORT)
Our hotel car will take you there
Have a good day, Sir, bye, Ma'am
You know what your problem is, Dan? You're constantly irritated.
When I'm with the two of you.
Well, my friend that you can't escape from... so you better learn to manage your moods
Sir, but I'm not here to swat flies.
All these dirty jobs are not worth my qualification
Our manager Asthana is being manipulative
You're blaming Asthana for the missing alcohol from banquets?
Sir, sir, sir, can I get an off on the 30th December? It's my parents' anniversary
And what are you doing here, go get yourself a haircut!
Years come and go, what's the big deal
Not one of you can handle your booze
Come on, guys, let's take a selfie
No, no, how will I go home? Dan's also not here.
Ya, even I haven't seen him
We may have to intubate her
The pulse is rapid and too weak...
Left pupil is dilated, right is sluggish
I think we should intubate her. - From which floor did she fall?
3rd floor, swimming pool... normally no one goes there at that hour.
Current status, patient on ventilator. - [AMBULANCE SIREN]
Left is dilated, right is very sluggish
ls she conscious? - In and out.
20 year old female, case of TBI (TRAUMATIC BRAIN INJURY)
She fell from the third floor, about 30 feet
You can check the blood reports
All her friends are from respectable families
I have to do my job
We're not going anywhere...Mom, it's okay
Do you think someone pushed her?
You could have picked up your phone
What you all have done is monumentally stupid!
Now on, don't utter a word to anyone...
Did you see how swollen her face was?
If you'd have seen her when she fell,
I had my life sucked out of me today.
You know, that pipe in her throat and nose?
I don't think they fit it properly.
No, no, that's how it's supposed to be.
They clean it, but it keeps coming back.
And what makes you the expert?
Ok, not an expert, but I definitely know more than you.
Those machines were making such a noise.
No, no, the one that shows your ECG (ELECTROCARDIOGRAM).
I think there's something wrong with the food
Sir, we could shift patient no. 31 to the ward.
Would you like to study the fresh scans for patient no. 28?
Right side SDH (SUBDURAL HEMATOMA) And no positive signs.
Seems like permanent Damage, waist down.
Mrs. lyer, in neurological terms, consciousness is defined by two things...
One, that the patient should be awake...
...And the other, the patient should be aware.
No... that would mean absolute end.
Clinically speaking, she has not reached that stage as yet.
It all depends on how damaged the white matter is.
Pass? - Ya, I changed my mind.
Are you part of the family? - No.
That other boy, is he the boyfriend? - No.
So...you're here for no reason, then?
Get the order for table 9 going, quick!
So, How is your friend feeling?
You can try jumping off the 4th floor and you'll know how it feels
What the hell are you doing?
Have you lost your mind? You'd better leave
So much of acceleration and deceleration in the brain
We are not 100% sure, but normally it's difficult to recover.
Sir, we feel the damage is irreversible
Not immediately, but eventually we will have to take a decision
I feel we can stretch this period little more
We should give Shiuli some time to fight it out
You can study undisturbed in that corner
Use the canteen coupons for lunch
...the isometric view as opposed to the...
...orthographic projection gives a more three dimensional view.
I was just checking the bill...
One hundred and seventy four thousand rupess... should I use your card?
No, request them for a week more.
How will you manage these expenses?
Did you see last month's bill?
Don't forget you're the only earning member.
What if things don't change in two months?
You'll be left penniless and drained...
Then he would've made her do engineering, not this silly hotel job.
Even two months seem too less.
...how can you give up so soon?
You'll have to take a decision soon.
Why would she sit on the ledge?
God knows what image you guys have of her.
I think she was quite stupid.
We were all just chatting, enjoying ourselves...
And that's it. She sat up there
Anyways, I don't want to talk about it...
And you all didn't think I should know?
Ya. So what's the big deal?
The big deal is that those were her last words.
She was just generally asking, nothing special right?
That's because all of you were too sloshed.
Or one of you could have stopped her from sitting there.
And you didn't even tell me.
Now how do I tell her where I was?
Hey, where are you off to?
Dan! - Who'll eat all this pizza?
I just have to speak to the patient for a bit.
See, I was here yesterday as well.
I have to speak to her.
I'll say what I have to and come back.
Rules are rules, come in the morning.
I know the likes of you.
This security guy is a tough nut to crack.
By the way, what was it that you wanted to say?
I have a night entry pass.
About your encounter with the guard.
Now I definitely will...just you wait!
Just a few minutes...please, I need to talk to the nurse.
you wanted to know where I was...
So, what doctor should one see for a stomach ache?
Is it gastric, liver-related or pregnancy? - Gastric
Then it's the ortho... Dr SN Dutta for bones
Is heart specialist and cardiologist the same?
No, no, I was just asking for my general knowledge.
Did Shiuli ever talk about me during college?
You've come to ask me this early in the morning?
No, we had better things to talk about.
Then why did she ask about me?
I mean, she's not dead yet, but...you know...
Look, I really don't think she was interested in you.
Then why did she ask about me?
Half an hour left to the shift...
I will, but tell me if you get to know anything.
Bring it straight in, turn a bit,
Just got so busy between the hospital and home...
You know, when I was a kid, I fractured my left arm.
It should have healed in 3 weeks but didn't.
Same way, Shiuli should have recovered by now...
Nurse, isn't the urine output more than usual today?
So that means kidney is not affected by the brain.
Don't you have anything better to do?
Ma'am, could you please lift your feet.
Uncle, could you lift your feet.
Wait, don't step on the wet floor.
What were you doing in the 3rd floor Neuro ICU?
Then why were you staring at the patient for so long?
You must have a lot of work,
Why were you staring at the patient for so long? Do your work...
Hey, hey, where are you off to?
Sir, I'm done with my shift.
I don't think so. Haven't you seen the duty roster?
No - Hotel is in full occupancy,.
Do you realize you're constantly at the hospital nowadays.
Fine, I won't go that often. - Ya, but it's not just me, everyone thinks so.
If she has to live in a vegetative state.
What's the point of torturing her?
Please Jairam, don't start with your negativity.
So what if she doesn't...you'd recognize her, right?
All you keep saying is pull the plug.
We have to give her time.
I'm going to the Accounts now.
Lives in the south of India.
I've given you all your medication Except for this one.
Who do I go to, then? I'm sorry
You're a chemist, you should know.
Does your brother have high blood pressure? - Yes.
This is Metasartan 25, it's a BP medicine.
Yes, do you have it? - Yes.
And as if you have time for us these days.
Oh is it? So you only relish hospital cafeteria food now?
6 shifts covered by Manjeet, 4 by Adi, and 3 by me!
Besides it's not like she was your best friend.
Look, I'm not asking what you are up to.
And I haven't asked anyone to cover my shifts. Never mind, leave it.
Okay, then why don't you ask that parade of doctors...
So you mean to say you guys do something only when it's a sure 'chance'?!
Atleast think before you open your trap.
The neuro guy? He's a genius!
No, just being sure of who we are dealing with.
I guess if you're so sure he's a genius, he must be.
It's the Neuro ICU doctors upstairs who are messing around.
Behave, or I'll get the security guards to ban your entry.
Outside the nurses' van in the night.
Hey, what I do with the nurses is none of your business.
I wanted to take 3-4 days off.
Off? You're already in the red!
Sir, he had a bad stomach ache when was in the (ARMY) field.
They found 4 large stones in his gall bladder.
Okay, let me think about it.
He's in a lot of pain...
Seems to be some kind of a stroke, I think. (LOUD SOUNDS OF MACHINES BEEPING)
Around 3 am, she started shaking violently.
And then in an hour, she had another seizure.
She's had a stroke and seizures, but you're still clinging 0n to hope.
You heard what the doctor confirmed last night.
Why can't you all be practical for once?
What good is her life if she can't even breathe on her own?
Is this how you want her to live?
Who are we to decide for her, it's her choice?
I don't think she wants to die.
Your uncle belongs in the jungle.
He has the patience of a monkey!
So what if she needs the machine's support for a while.
There are so many times my motorbike doesn't start.
Then I push it, and it kicks in.
The ventilator is also a push. So bear with it for a while.
Mrs. lyer, coma patients react to strong smells sometimes.
Their olfactory senses can respond to external stimuli.
In this case, her nose twitched because of these night Jasmine flowers...
Maybe, it's some kind of hint that she could be conscious.
We can't conclude that, but we're 0n the right track
How long have you been doing this?
No one likes to marry a nurse.
We nurse the patients, touch them here and there.
Then call me for your wedding.
Only if you come with a gift!
The night jasmine season is ending.
Can you twitch your nose again?
I want to see it too.
Did you run into him outside?
Then make sure he doesn't sit there.
Make him sit far away... like here, maybe.
Just don't let him get anywhere near the plug!
The hospital pharmacy doesn't have this medicine in stock.
You have to get it from outside
Do you have this in stock?
There are 9,000 weddings in New Delhi today
In one day? Ya...they've all lost it
That's seventeen thousand two hundred rupees.
Yes, our card machine isn't working, cash please
I hope you'll be open for a while?
Look, what you've done to yourself
You couldn't stop yourself from getting sucked into their family matter, could you?
Even your clothes reek of hospital smell now!
Dan, you'll get one from me now!
We're not so petty, you know.
This is how it's gonna be now.
...you opened your eyes at 5 am today.
I want you to put in a little more effort...
Shiuli, can you look to your left, this side.
Can you look to your right?
I think this is a significant development.
Yes Sir, I think she is trying to communicate.
Shiuli, can you do what you did in the morning again, for your family?
This is your left, and your right.
Can you look to your left... left...good!
Language comprehension... don't know to what extent.
I mean, to understand words, retain them and then act on them.
That is, memory retention, following commands...
We will work on that now.
GCS (GLASGOW COMA SCALE) will determine all that.
Your hair is looking so nice.
Shiuli, now get better soon and let's go home.
So, is she fully conscious now?
Thallamus...cortex...medulla oblongata... dorsal plexus of the spine.
The spiritual mix of these scientific terms is just one...the soul.
And the soul doesn't go into a coma.
You mean, when will she walk, when will she eat...
For a perfect medical definition of consciousness,
Aren't you getting overtly affected by this?
And how come you're so unaffected?
We do visit her when we can.
But that doesn't mean we get consumed by it.
But we need to prioritize... there's career...there's family
Do you play the piano, Shiuli?
Shiuli, I'm going to press your shoulder now.
Yeah, that's because the doctor asked her your entire family history...
Poor thing must have got tired.
In the hotel we work quite closely with each other.
Look left if you recognize me.
Then why didn't you say so in the morning?
Actually you did the right thing.
Oh, now I get it why you didn't, hmmm
So listen, if the doctors ask you tomorrow...
Do you know Dan, Stick to No.
Can you lend me some money?
A little left of the eyebrow, maybe?
No she looks fine Just a little bit more...hmmm?
What's happening here? - Nothing at all!
Do you want your eyebrows to be done?
We have to talk to him.
I've paid the rent for this month too.
Sorry, mate, I ran out of money.
We pay the maid more than the stipend you get.
That's because the hotel guys are cutting my pay.
Of course they would, since you're hardly on duty!
And the restaurant dream? That's over, right!
Adi is moving in with us.
I can't bear the house expenses alone.
[SOUND OF FIREWORKS, INDICATING 'DIWALI', THE FESTIVAL OF LIGHTS]
Only 55 days on duty from March to September?
And on top of that, your temperamental issues...
Be prepared for the consequences, Dan.
Another hotel and you would've been shown the door by now.
It's just a matter of two months.
If you get terminated from here, no 5-star will touch you.
And from tomorrow, you'll report on time, okay?
Do you want it or not?
How dare you take that tone with me?
So you take it yourself then. Take it!
Why should I'? It's your job to serve me.
So serve, with gloves on! - I am...now move on.
Hey, hey, hold on. - You come ahead please.
It's my turn, you have to serve me first!
What are you doing? Leave him alone!
You couldn't even visit us once in 10 months?
And finally I see you here.
Otherwise I would've been lost trying to look for you in the hospital
We have to pay back a penalty of three hundred thousand rupees.
Don't try to be oversmart with me, Dan
Look around you, you've made this hospital your home.
What have you done to yourself, Dan?
She must be tired, that's why she's sleeping...
What you are doing is not easy.
If I were in your place...
I don't know if I could've done the same.
But then I remind myself that I have to hold it all together.
Dan has been like a pillar.
Children really are pillars for their parents.
...they start living life on their own terms.
And we live in a constant fear of losing them.
Aunty, Dr Ghosh is in the OPD
They should be there. - No they're not.
I have one of them, but the other one's missing.
How can it not be there?
And your parents have expectations from you...
Your mother is a good person.
We'll manage things here. Don't worry.
Hello, Ma'am. - Hi, I am Priya.
Hope you had a good journey? - Yes, Ma'am.
Asthana had called. He spoke very fondly of you.
Hi guys, this is your new manager, Danish Walia.
Danish, this will be your team.
So this place has 22 rooms in all.
We have two categories of rooms...
You can put the temperature to your liking.
You had asked about the off-road trails, so this is what we figured out...
Put these away in the store room too.
If you follow this, I think you'll be fine, okay?
Just get there and Shane will guide you.
You didn't call, so ljust thought I'll...
The last 3-4 days have been quite tough, Dan.
Then she had a seizure while sleeping.
So we had to take her back to the ICU.
But if it happens repeatedly, it can lead to severe cardiac problems.
Let's show Amma (MOM) that you can do it, Shiuli.
The physio lady wanted her to do something
But she became violent and scratched herself.
We had to tie her hands...
But, all this is now a part of our lives, Dan.
Lift this leg up, come on, try...Shiuli.
Don't you want to go home?
Can I just take her out for a bit?
I know you're mad at me.
Don't you want to get better?
Sleep now or the doctor will throw me out.
You've been here for a few days and you call me now?
Do you know who she is?
Make sure there aren't any jerks.
This one is not fixed properly.
Later, we can make it permanent.
Keep the curtains open. The X-rays can go into the desk - Yes
Aunty, I'm telling you, you're going easy on her.
She's become lazy. Keep giving her tough ones.
Did you ever want to go, far away?
Never imagined you'd go into a coma, did you?
That night...when you fell from the terrace...
Why did you ask "Where is Dan?"
You leave, It's going to be quite foggy today.
Send a relative to the local health centre,
They'll give you the death certificate. I'll sign it.
She had a seizure around 2 am.
In half an hour, sister was gone.
Sister was a fighter, right Morn?
You asked why we named her Shiuli (NIGHT JASMINE)?
She loved the Night Jasmine flower
Every year Shiuli would eagerly await October...
And she would collect them on a sheet with her grandfather.
They have a very short life...
So just like them, she fell too.
Mom, I have to go to the tutor's... or should I skip it?
So what are you up to these days?
After Shiuli...the hotel hired me back.
I got my diploma in six months and have been a sous chef since.
You said focus on your work...
Some days I really want to talk about her,
But who I can talk to?
I haven't spoken about her with anyone either.
Planning to shift to our Home-town in the south.
We have extended family there... another two weeks perhaps.
I don't want to leave the Night Jasmine tree here, unattended...
